patches.replace: This is genuine peer-reviewed data. Note: The dome author removed WIN-025 from his active WIN list on 2026-03-15, citing geomagnetic storm contamination of the April 8, 2024 eclipse window. The observation remains on-record here as part of the model's published history; our verdict stands regardless of whether the claim is currently claimed.
patches.rationale: ISS-1473: Integrity report MODERATE #2 — annotate that dome author dropped WIN-025. Preempts 'you are refuting a claim he already dropped' objection.
